label: Alert Feed
description: Filterable alert table with severity, entity, timestamp, action buttons, and expandable detail sheet.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx line 89

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore. ColumnDef<Alert, unknown> uses unknown (not any). Double-cast 'as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]' at export config is a type-narrowing bridge, not a type suppression.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file

0.6.note: isLoading passed to TableWidget which renders loading skeleton

0.7.note: emptyMessage='No active alerts — all systems operating normally' passed to TableWidget

0.8.note: error prop passed: isError ? 'Failed to load alerts' : null; onRetry={refetch} wired

0.9.note: No dead code. All imports used. alertsResponse used in dataFreshness.lastUpdated.

1.1.note: All data from useAlertsData(): filteredAlerts, isLoading, isError, refetch, counts, mutation fns, filter state

1.2.note: AlertsDataProvider reads useGlobalScope() and applies scopeStrategyIds filter

1.3.note: allAlerts memo depends on scope.organizationIds; changing org rerenders widget with updated filteredAlerts

1.4.note: scope.clientIds flows through getStrategyIdsForScope in context; client filter narrows alert.entity matches

1.5.note: scope.strategyIds flows through getStrategyIdsForScope; strategy filter narrows to specific strategy alerts

1.6.note: scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 skips entity filter; empty scope returns full unfiltered alert set

1.7.note: ALERT_EXPORT_COLUMNS imported from lib/config/services/alerts.config — correct location

l1.notes: Most complete widget in the alerts domain. Full filter chain: scope → status/severity/source/search. BatchGuardButton disables mutations in batch mode.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time alert stream, mutation actions enabled), paper ✓ (alerts visible, mutations disabled by BatchGuardButton when isBatchMode), batch ✓ (historical alerts shown, all action buttons disabled via BatchGuardButton + isBatchMode check).

3.2.note: AlertsDataProvider reads scope.mode via useGlobalScope(); isBatchMode = scope.mode === 'batch'. useAlerts hook disables refetchInterval in batch. BatchGuardButton wraps all mutation buttons.

3.5.note: Paper mode: same behavior as live — alerts visible, mutations active. Paper mode distinguishes from batch (paper uses real-time pubsub, batch reads GCS). BatchGuardButton checks isBatchMode only, not paper mode.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or polling interval in widget itself. useAlerts refetchInterval: false in batch (use-alerts.ts:20). dataFreshness.isWebSocket: false correctly set.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 complete. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending: 3.3 — batch mode disables Ack/Escalate/Resolve buttons via BatchGuardButton; 3.4 — isBatchMode renders 'Batch — actions disabled' badge in header.

4.1.note: No dead buttons. Ack: onClick={() => acknowledgeAlert(alert.id)} ✓. Escalate: onClick={() => escalateAlert(alert)} ✓. Resolve: onClick={() => resolveAlert(alert.id)} ✓. ChevronRight SheetTrigger: opens detail sheet ✓.

4.2.note: No href='#' or link elements found.

4.5.note: No navigation links to gated pages.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render. All handled at widget-wrapper level via registry.

l4.notes: Agent prep complete. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 pending. 4.3: columns (Severity, Alert, Entity, Value/Threshold, Status, Time, Actions) cover domain function. 4.4: mutation buttons → toast feedback. 4.7: Sheet detail panel open/close. 4.8: table scroll within widget bounds.

5.1.note: Target strategies: cross-domain monitoring widget. Serves all strategy types — defi (basis-trade, recursive-staked-basis, amm-lp, lending-borrowing, staking, cross-chain-bridge), cefi, tradfi, sports, predictions. Alert entities include strategy, venue, service, position entity types.

l5.notes: 5.1 complete. Human checks 5.2-5.6 pending. 5.3: Ack/Escalate/Resolve flow through mutation API. 5.4: empty state message shown when filteredAlerts=[]. 5.5: downstream impact on kpi-strip counts. 5.6: venue-agnostic.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 (tests) not in scope for this agent pass.

7.1.note: Mapped --status-error → text-status-critical / bg-status-critical / border-status-critical (existing token surfaced in rollout). All arbitrary var(--status-error) usages in getSeverityColor, getStatusColor, and highCount Badge converted to utility classes.
7.1.fix: Substituted text-[var(--status-error)] → text-status-critical, bg-[var(--status-error)]/10 → bg-status-critical/10, border-[var(--status-error)] → border-status-critical throughout helper fns and badge rendering.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports. ALERT_EXPORT_COLUMNS from lib/config/services/alerts.config. No duplicated fixtures.

7.3.note: 459 lines — within 500-line limit. Largest single component (alertColumns useMemo) is ~240 lines but spans JSX cells, not complex logic. No single function exceeds 200 lines of logic.

7.4.note: AlertsTableWidget: PascalCase ✓. BatchGuardButton: PascalCase ✓. getSeverityColor/getStatusColor/getSeverityIcon: camelCase helper fns ✓. File: alerts-table-widget.tsx kebab-case ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= found.

7.7.note: alertColumns useMemo has stable dep array: [isBatchMode, acknowledgePending, escalatePending, resolvePending, acknowledgeAlert, escalateAlert, resolveAlert]. filterConfig and actionsConfig are JSX-adjacent locals — they reconstruct each render but contain no expensive derivation. No inline object/array literals in useEffect/useMemo deps.

l7.notes: 7.1 fixed via --status-error → text-status-critical mapping. 7.5 deferred (i18n). All other checks pass.

8.1.note: text-[10px] → text-micro applied at line 378 ('Batch — actions disabled' badge).
8.1.fix: Substituted text-[10px] → text-micro (new 0.625rem / 10px token in @theme inline).

8.2.note: No spacing arbitrary values (p-[...], m-[...], gap-[...]) found.

8.3.note: Uses TableWidget, Badge, Button, Card, CardContent, Sheet family, Tooltip family — all from components/ui/*. No raw div replacements for shared primitives.

8.4.note: Agent: No . No interactive divs without role. aria-label='Acknowledge alert' on Ack buttons ✓. All interactive elements are Button or SheetTrigger. Human a11y walkthrough pending.

8.5.note: Human pending: resize test at minW=6, minH=5.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed via text-micro token. 8.2/8.3/8.4(agent) pass. 8.5 requires human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Primary alerts interaction surface. The inline Sheet detail panel already integrates detail view — no separate detail widget needed. Kill-switch is a separate action panel with distinct emergency intervention scope.

relationships.notes: Effectively a self-contained master+detail widget (table rows open detail Sheet inline). Peer relationship with alerts-kpi-strip (both read same filteredAlerts dataset). No cross-widget selection key emitted.

dataContract.notes: useAlerts() queries /api/alerts/list via REST. No auto-refetch in live mode unless React Query staleTime triggers. Batch: refetchInterval disabled. Mutations: useAcknowledgeAlert, useEscalateAlert, useResolveAlert → POST /api/alerts/{id}/acknowledge|escalate|resolve. defiAlerts generated reactively from mock-trade-ledger on mock-order-filled / mock-ledger-reset window events.

gaps: Source filter only has 'recovery' option — other source categories (market-data, risk-engine, etc.) not filterable
Entity filter missing — can only filter by entityType indirectly through search
Batch-mode: mutations disabled but no explicit batch-mode empty-state messaging beyond the badge
coverage.notes: Cross-domain widget. Handles all alert entity types (strategy, venue, service, position). DeFi-reactive alerts generated from ledger events.

findings.fix: Mapped --status-error → text-status-critical / bg-status-critical / border-status-critical (existing token). Converted getSeverityColor critical+high branches (lines 45,47), getStatusColor active branch (line 60), and highCount Badge (line 372).

findings.description: alerts-table-widget.tsx — ~30 user-visible strings (column headers, filter labels, badge labels, empty/error messages)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.fix: Substituted text-[10px] → text-micro (new 0.625rem token in @theme inline) on 'Batch — actions disabled' badge label at line 378.
